professionalSummary: I am an Information Systems and Technologies graduate and a Machine Learning Engineer / Data Scientist focused on deploying and optimizing AI models in production environments. I co-authored an academic paper with my team members, published in the El-Cezeri Journal of Science and Engineering (2026), on deep learning models integrating attention mechanisms (Attention U-Net/U-Net++) for military camouflaged object detection. During my internship at Deep Think Technology, I developed industrial computer vision systems featuring real-time YOLOv8-seg inference, PyQt5 GUI design, and camera SDK integration. I am experienced in optimizing Small Language Models (SLMs like mT5) and Edge AI/TinyML applications (SVM on Arduino) using ONNX Runtime and INT8 quantization for resource-constrained devices. I ranked in the top 10 finalists of the Pupilica AI Hackathon with the practical solutions I developed. My primary focus lies in end-to-end model development workflows—from data preprocessing and model training to deployment and optimization in computer vision and natural language processing.

experiences.title: Machine Learning Intern
description: Developed an "Apple Detection and Quality Analysis System" using YOLOv8-seg for real-time fruit detection and CIEDE2000 color quality analysis.
Designed and implemented a desktop GUI with PyQt5, integrating camera SDK, ML inference, and physical dimension measurement modules.
Trained and deployed computer vision models on embedded devices for real-time edge AI inference.
Gained hands-on experience in data preprocessing, model evaluation, and the practical challenges of edge computing.
